title: Youtube Poop: Spigh Kydz (Part 1)
description:
A two-parter?!  No way!

This is probably going to be the largest Poop I upload in a while.  I've got exams coming up and I need to devote a lot of time to my studies.

Anywho, I saw this movie while babysiting for somebody (Yes, I babysit.  Hard to believe, huh?).  I thought it'd be fun to try and Poop it.  It turned out that there was so much I could do with this movie, I couldn't fit it into one video!  This is the first part of the Poop.  The second part will probably be uploaded over the summer.

Behold, the fruits of two months worth of labour!  Happy Memorial Day!  Enjoy! :)


((Note: Special thanks to MoebusOne for the video file amd cupcakecerry for letting me use her rabbit puppet video!))
